title: Orophaca hyalina
taxonomy: Orophaca hyalina belongs to the family Fabaceae. It is a type of legume native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. The species is closely related to Astragalus, another genus of vetches. Orophaca hyalina is a perennial plant that produces small, white or pink flowers. It is often found growing in dry, sandy areas and rocky outcroppings.
